claim_boundary: Phase 6 registration only. This does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, agreement detection, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase6_goal: Inspect candidate pairs for metadata comparability: category match, source-type diversity, retrieval timestamp presence, uncertainty-label preservation, claim-boundary preservation, and whether later human review would be meaningful.
purpose: Move from candidate comparison pairs to bounded metadata-level pair inspection without claiming agreement, contradiction, corroboration, or truth.
required_gates: Gate 1: load Phase 5 candidate pairs only
Gate 2: verify both sides preserve source provenance
Gate 5: preserve uncertainty and claim-safety labels
Gate 6: mark pair as inspection-ready or held
Gate 7: no contradiction detection, agreement detection, truth resolution, alerts, or production monitoring
